query:
-- Welcome message from Jessica (admin, id=1) to Sarah (id=2)
INSERT INTO messages (tripId, fromUserId, toUserId, content, isRead, createdAt)
VALUES
(1, 1, 2, 'Hi Sarah! 🎉 Welcome to your Next Chapter Travel portal! I''m so excited to help plan your family''s Disney World adventure. Your trip is all set — June 14-21 at the Polynesian Village Resort. I''ve loaded your complete itinerary, packing list, and booking confirmations into the app. Feel free to message me anytime with questions! — Jessica', true, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY)),
(1, 1, 2, 'Quick tip: Download the My Disney Experience app before your trip and link your reservation number POLY-RES-2026-0614. You''ll be able to book Lightning Lane selections and check wait times in real-time. I''ve already added your park tickets to the account! Let me know if you need help with the app. 🏰', true, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)),
(1, 2, 1, 'Jessica, this portal is AMAZING! I can see everything — the day-by-day itinerary, all our confirmations, even the packing list. The kids are going to flip when they see the Space 220 reservation! One question — should we pack light for the parks or will we have time to go back to the hotel midday?', false, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY));

-- Disney World destination guide
INSERT INTO destination_guides (destination, country, heroImageUrl, overview, currency, language, timezone, bestTimeToVisit, weatherInfo, tipsJson, emergencyNumbers, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  'Walt Disney World',
  'United States',
  'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1605833556294-ea5c7a74f57d?w=1280&q=80',
  'Walt Disney World Resort is a world-class entertainment complex spanning 27,000 acres in Orlando, Florida. Home to four theme parks (Magic Kingdom, EPCOT, Hollywood Studios, Animal Kingdom), two water parks, Disney Springs shopping district, and over 30 resort hotels. Known as "The Most Magical Place on Earth," it offers unparalleled immersive experiences for guests of all ages.',
  'USD',
  'English',
  'Eastern Time (ET) — UTC-5',
  'September through November offers the best combination of shorter wait times and comfortable temperatures. Avoid June-August (peak crowds, extreme heat) and major holidays.',
  'Orlando has a subtropical climate. Summers (June-August) are hot and humid with daily afternoon thunderstorms. Temperatures reach 90°F+ with high humidity. Always carry ponchos! Fall and spring are ideal.',
  JSON_ARRAY(
    JSON_OBJECT('category', 'App', 'tip', 'Download My Disney Experience app before arrival. Link your reservation to access Lightning Lane, mobile ordering, and digital room key.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('category', 'Timing', 'tip', 'Arrive at park opening for Early Entry (resort guests get 30 min head start). Rope drop is the best strategy for low wait times on popular rides.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('category', 'Food', 'tip', 'Mobile order at quick service restaurants to skip the line. The app shows estimated pickup times.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('category', 'Weather', 'tip', 'Pack lightweight ponchos — afternoon storms are nearly daily in summer. They pass quickly, usually within 30-45 minutes.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('category', 'Savings', 'tip', 'Free water is available at any quick service location. Bring reusable bottles and ask for cups of ice water.'),
    JSON_OBJECT('category', 'Transportation', 'tip', 'The Polynesian Resort has a monorail directly to Magic Kingdom and a boat to EPCOT. No need for buses to those parks!')
  ),
  JSON_OBJECT('emergency', '911', 'disney_security', '407-560-7959', 'resort_front_desk', '407-824-2000', 'nearest_hospital', 'AdventHealth Celebration: 407-303-4000'),
  NOW(), NOW()
);

-- Travel alert for Sarah's trip
INSERT INTO travel_alerts (tripId, userId, title, content, severity, isRead, createdAt)
VALUES
(1, 2, 'Lightning Lane Booking Window Opens Soon!', 'Your Lightning Lane Multi Pass booking window opens 7 days before your first park day (June 8th). I''ll send you a reminder, but mark your calendar! Popular rides like Seven Dwarfs Mine Train and Tiana''s Bayou Adventure sell out within minutes of the booking window opening.', 'info', false, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY));
